calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend And Correcct Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA BAIL BONDS, INC.'s Motion To Amend And Correct Judgment.

Judgment creditor Espinoza Bail Bonds, Inc.'s motion to amend and correct judgment is denied and its alternate request to vacate and set aside the default judgment filed June 22, 2023 is granted. Plaintiff cites no statutory or case authority, and the court is not aware of any, that allows a judgment creditor whose attorney used an incorrect name in filing suit and seeking entry of judgment may have the judgment corrected to reflect the true name of the party who claims to be entitled to collect on the judgment. This error cannot fairly be characterized as "clerical error." A person entitled to pursue a claim and obtain judgment in his favor presumably knows his own true name. Becasue no opposition was filed and there is good cause to vacate the June 22, 2023 judgment, the alternate request to vacate that judgment is granted.

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
